name: Alistar
title: The Minotaur
shortBio:
- Trample (P) and Triumphant Roar (E) have swapped
- Can build Ability Power
- Can solo lane

skins.name: Black Alistar
skins.description: Given to players who pre-ordered the Digital Collector's Edition of League of Legends.

skins.name: Marauder Alistar
skins.description: Though the great armies of the Magelord Empire have vanished into antiquity, their modern descendants uphold the vicious brutality of their ancestors. Alistar, a prime specimen of the beastmen hordes, now fights for the same culture that conquered his own people so very long ago.

skins.name: Moo Cow Alistar
skins.description: A rare cow-themed variant of the popular Alistar figurines, mint-in-box units have been known to go for several thousand dollars at auction. Yesterday, this one was submerged in the tub. Children don't deserve nice things.

skins.name: Hextech Alistar
skins.description: The fusion of arcane sorcery and Piltovan ingenuity, Alistar is an advanced, living golem built by the finest artificers in Runeterra. Tasked with guarding the secrets of hextech, it crushes all who would abuse the methods behind its creation.

skins.name: Blackfrost Alistar

chromas.name: Blackfrost Alistar (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

skins.description: The mightiest of all minotaurs, Alistar once roamed the northern mountains freely… but when the endless winter came and blanketed his home in frost as dark as the heart of the Ice Witch herself, the fearsome behemoth fell prey to an eerie corruption—as his fur and bone twisted into pure, frozen malice.

skins.name: Elderwood Alistar

chromas.name: Elderwood Alistar (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

skins.description: “Far beneath the deepest roots, the binding shackles break. Two horns then pierce the woodland night—the mighty auroch wakes. His hide is wrought in earth and moss, his hooves are granite made. And though the wise do fear his might, his gentleness yet reigns.” –Ballad of the Forest–shaker

skins.name: Black Alistar Modern
skins.description: Given to players who pre-ordered the Digital Collector's Edition of League of Legends.

skins.name: Classic Alistar
skins.description: One of the original 40 champions, Alistar rampaged onto the Rift known only as "Minotaur" during League's alpha, and started headbutting enemies THREE TIMES further than he does these days. He was somewhat tamed before League's release, but not enough to stop Season 1 MVP Shushei carrying Fnatic to victory on the back of his terrifying AP Alistar plays.

passive.name: Trample
passive.description: Each time Alistar casts a spell, he Tramples nearby units and turrets for a few seconds, dealing damage to units he walks over.

spells.name: Pulverize
spells.description: Alistar smashes the ground, dealing damage to all nearby enemies and tossing them into the air. On landing, enemies are stunned.
spells.dynamicDescription: Alistar smashes the ground, <status>Knocking Up</status> enemies for @KnockupDuration@ second and dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Headbutt
spells.description: Alistar rams a target with his head, dealing damage and knocking the target back.
spells.dynamicDescription: Alistar rams into an enemy, <status>Knocking</status> them <status>Back</status> and dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Triumphant Roar
spells.description: Alistar lets out a commanding war cry, restoring health to himself and nearby allies. Nearby enemy deaths reduce the cooldown.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Alistar roars restoring @TotalHeal@ Health to Alistar and @AllyHeal@ Health to nearby allies.

Nearby enemy deaths reduce this Ability's Cooldown by @NearbyDeathCDR@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Unbreakable Will
spells.description: Alistar lets out a wild roar, gaining bonus damage, removing all crowd-control effects on himself, and reducing incoming physical and magical damage for the duration.
spells.dynamicDescription: Alistar immediately cleanses all <status>Disabling</status> effects, gains <physicalDamage>@BonusDamage@ Attack Damage</physicalDamage> and takes @RDamageReduction@% reduced damage for @RDuration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
